query: 那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…
那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains Codex VS Code context minor GC behavior in the UMC project. Prior context: user questioned why context data looked wrong and whether per-turn GC now works normally; assistant clarified GC is evaluated each turn but only applied when conditions are met, including a default minTurns=3 gate, so a brand-new conversation may not compress yet. Latest user asks for concrete test scenarios to verify GC is working, makes visible selection decisions, keeps context bounded during continuous conversation, and shrinks context after topic switches.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn directly continues the same unresolved GC-debugging topic and depends on the prior explanation about when GC does or does not trigger. No earlier turns are clearly irrelevant yet, and unresolved task context should remain raw rather than demoted to pins.
